case_title: WARNER, ROY vs. LEE, JAMES IND & BALMORAL RESIDENCE CLUB et al

docket_entries.description: STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAY-22-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON MAY-22-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR JUN-20-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF JUN-20-1996, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $100.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON JUN-20-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), 2ND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE PER CCP 575.2: AS TO WHY THIS ACTION SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED AND TO RESPOND TO THE COURT'S FACT FINDING INQUIRY INTO COUNSEL'S ROLE IN THE ABOVE MENTIONED PARTY'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH TRIAL DELAY REDUCTION ACT AND THE LOCAL RULES OF COURT. CASE WILL BE DISMISSED IF NO APPEARANCE AND/OR GOOD CAUSE., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUL-17-1996 CONTINUED FROM JUN-20-1996 TO JUL-22-1996 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

GENERAL NEGLIGENCE, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WARNER, ROY AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, JAMES IND & BALMORAL RESIDENCE CLUB DOES 1 TO 30 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAY-22-1996 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-25-1996 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAY-02-1996
